detaileddescription.para: Initialize needs to be called before data may be encrypted successfully
Initialize succeeded and is currently able to encrypt data
Size of the RSA key in bits
Size of the RSA key in bytes Maximum plain text length that can be encrypted with public RSA key

briefdescription.para: Clear all saved data and states.
Initialize OpenSSL module.
Generate random new RSA Key.

parameterdescription.para: RSA Key size in bits value. (optional)

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< uint8 > &InPublicExponent, const TArray< uint8 > &InPrivateExponent, const TArray< uint8 > &InModulus)
memberdef.name: CreateKey

briefdescription.para: Create RSA Key using 'public/private exponent' and 'modulus'.

parameterdescription.para: Public Key for the RSA key.
Private Key for the RSA key.
Modulus data for the RSA Key.

briefdescription.para: Sign the message using the stored RSA Key.

simplesect.para: A boolean flag indicates successful/failed operation.

briefdescription.para: Verify the message.

simplesect.para: A boolean flag indicates successful/failed operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArrayView< const uint8 > InSource, TArray< uint8 > &OutDestination)
memberdef.name: EncryptPublic

briefdescription.para: Encrypt with public key.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArrayView< const uint8 > InSource, TArray< uint8 > &OutDestination)
memberdef.name: DecryptPublic

briefdescription.para: Decrypt with public key.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArrayView< const uint8 > InSource, TArray< uint8 > &OutDestination)
memberdef.name: EncryptPrivate

briefdescription.para: Encrypt with private key.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArrayView< const uint8 > InSource, TArray< uint8 > &OutDestination)
memberdef.name: DecryptPrivate

briefdescription.para: Decrypt with private key.
Destroy(Free) RSA Key.
Retrieve size of the RSA Key in bytes value.

simplesect.para: Size of the RSA Key in bytes value.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve size of the stored RSA Key in bits value.

simplesect.para: Size of the stored RSA Key in bits value.

briefdescription.para: Set key size for the stored RSA key.

parameterdescription.para: RSA Key size in bits value.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the Modulus data of the RSA Key.
Retrieve the Public Key of the RSA Key.
Retrieve the Private Key of the RSA Key.
Set Modulus data for the RSA Key.

parameterdescription.para: Modulus data for the RSA Key.

briefdescription.para: Set Public Key for the RSA Key.

parameterdescription.para: Public Key for the RSA key.

briefdescription.para: Set Private Key for the RSA Key.

parameterdescription.para: Private Key for the RSA key.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve maximum data size.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FRSAKeyHandle InKey, const TArray< uint8 > &InMsg, TArray< uint8 > &Out)
